_doc: Machine-readable lane->epic index the ops-monitor (scripts/ops-monitor-check.sh) reads with jq. Join key = epic_id; ready-count per lane = `br ready --parent <epic_id> --limit 0 --json`. A lane is KNOWN/resumable when gate is null or expired; GATED only when a non-null unexpired gate object is present. epic_id:null REQUIRES a non-null gate (the lane has no ready-bead source, so it can never spuriously fire the stall wake). Admiral-owned; captain updates on staffing. Update in the SAME action as any lane add/retask/park. Seed = active + on-deck + parked lanes only (DONE lanes are not staffing candidates).

lanes.label: codename:logmine
lanes.note: GATE-0 (hk-hcrvb core-loop-proof) DONE + CLOSED; redeploy shipped (b25e9919 live). kynes re-tasked to logmine (hk-mhmaw self-improvement pipeline) on kynes2-q; last dispatched hk-q6nve (agent-reviewer worktree-registration). NOTE: the OLD kynes-q is a DEFUNCT drained scratch queue (0 pending, paused-by-failure, undeletable — no queue-GC verb); its recurring ops-monitor paused-queue:kynes-q [IMMEDIATE] flag is BENIGN NOISE (NOT GATE-0-expected anymore). Do NOT resume-whack it. Tracked: hk-zfv3u (queue-GC / ops-monitor drained-queue filter).

CONSTRAINT: gb-mbp live re-enable is OPERATOR-HELD — hawat does NOT flip gb-mbp; needs-live-remote beads escalate to captain. Only hk-fijwi is ready now; the rest unblock after ratification. Pi-as-orchestrator shares the same gap; routing+non-TUI beads cover it.

Captain-closed .6 (merged OOB b8755e25) -> unblocked .14. hk-j5yer.13 is a P0 HARD GATE (harmonik digest parity, must DEPLOY before Step-4 tombstone). File-disjoint from the other 5 lanes.
